introduction: Today, we will be exploring the efficiency of our customer support in Q4 2025. Our focus will be on the resolution of inquiries within a 24-hour timeframe.

subsections.heading: Overview of Customer Support Inquiries
subsections.content:
• Total number of customer inquiries increased by 20% from 2024 to 2025
• 60% of inquiries were related to software usability issues
• 25% of inquiries were related to hardware integration problems
• 15% of inquiries were about billing and payment issues
• Around 10% of inquiries were repetitive, indicating a need for better FAQ resources
• The average response time to inquiries was 12 hours in 2025
• High influx of inquiries was noticed during peak hours of 10 AM - 2 PM
subsections.justification: This slide provides an overview of inquiries but does not specify resolution rates within 24 hours in Q4 2025.

subsections.heading: Breakdown of Q4 2025 Support Resolution
subsections.content:
• During Q4 2025, we experienced a seasonal increase in support inquiries
• The software-related resolutions saw a 15% improvement from Q3
• Hardware-related inquiries took longer to resolve due to the need for third-party involvement
• Billing issues were generally resolved within the same day
• The Customer Support department introduced a new ticketing system in Q4
• The new system improved tracking and categorizing of support inquiries
• Non-urgent inquiries were automatically scheduled for resolution within 48 hours
subsections.justification: This slide provides a general breakdown of Q4 support resolution but doesn't mention the percentage resolved within 24 hours.

subsections.heading: Comparative Analysis of Q3 vs Q4 Resolution
subsections.content:
• Overall resolution rate improved by 8% from Q3 to Q4 2025
• The time taken to resolve hardware-related issues decreased by 20% in Q4
• Software-related inquiries saw a 10% improvement in resolution time
• The introduction of the new ticketing system improved response rate by 15%
• Billing-related inquiries saw a slight increase in resolution time due to end of year audits
• Customer satisfaction scores improved by 5% from Q3 to Q4
subsections.justification: This slide compares Q3 and Q4 resolution rates but doesn't specify the percentage of inquiries resolved within 24 hours in Q4 2025.

conclusion: To improve our customer experience, it's crucial that we continue to monitor and enhance our support resolution times. Let's identify potential areas for improvement and implement changes in the upcoming quarter.

image_queries.slide_title: Comparative Analysis of Q3 vs Q4 Resolution
